steps.title: Convert the percentage to a fraction
steps.content: To find $30\%$ of $360$, we express the percentage as a fraction: $30\% = \frac{30}{100} = \frac{3}{10}$.

steps.title: Multiply the fraction by the whole
steps.content: Now we multiply: $$\frac{3}{10} \times 360 = \frac{1080}{10} = 108.$$ This means $108$ is three tenths of $360$. That confirms B is correct.
